## Notes

- `proxy_mirror` means BFF endpoint mirrors OMS upstream and is not auto-marked for removal.
- `v1_compat_legacy_candidate` means v1 and v2 intent overlap was detected and migration planning is recommended.
- Phase 2 performs HTTP-only checks and hard-fails on 5xx/request errors; contract mismatch is reported separately as drift.
